      <tr class="thead" data-row="103">
         <th aria-label="Rk" data-stat="ranker" class="tooltip ranker sort_default_asc show_partial_when_sorting center" data-tip="&lt;strong&gt;Rank&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;br&gt;This is a count of the rows from top to bottom.&lt;br&gt;It is recalculated following the sorting of a column.">Rk</th>

      <tr class="thead" data-row="233">
         <th aria-label="Rk" data-stat="ranker" class="tooltip ranker sort_default_asc show_partial_when_sorting center" data-tip="&lt;strong&gt;Rank&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;br&gt;This is a count of the rows from top to bottom.&lt;br&gt;It is recalculated following the sorting of a column.">Rk</th>

      <tr class="thead" data-row="363">
         <th aria-label="Rk" data-stat="ranker" class="tooltip ranker sort_default_asc show_partial_when_sorting center" data-tip="&lt;strong&gt;Rank&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;br&gt;This is a count of the rows from top to bottom.&lt;br&gt;It is recalculated following the sorting of a column.">Rk</th>

      <tr class="thead" data-row="493">
         <th aria-label="Rk" data-stat="ranker" class="tooltip ranker sort_default_asc show_partial_when_sorting center" data-tip="&lt;strong&gt;Rank&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;br&gt;This is a count of the rows from top to bottom.&lt;br&gt;It is recalculated following the sorting of a column.">Rk</th>

      <tr class="thead" data-row="623">
         <th aria-label="Rk" data-stat="ranker" class="tooltip ranker sort_default_asc show_partial_when_sorting center" data-tip="&lt;strong&gt;Rank&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;br&gt;This is a count of the rows from top to bottom.&lt;br&gt;It is recalculated following the sorting of a column.">Rk</th>
